title: 快速开始
content_zh:
<!-- docs-icon: 🚀 -->

# 快速开始

## 获取企业账户

NeoRouter.AI 采用企业邀请制开通，账户由平台商务或您所在租户的管理员统一创建与分发。

1. 若贵司尚未开通 NeoRouter.AI 账户，请联系商务：<support@neorouter.ai>
2. 已有租户的成员，会在邮箱中收到管理员发送的邀请邮件，点击邮件中的链接即可激活账户

## 获取 API Key

API Key 由租户的 Owner 或 Admin 在 [管理后台](/#/console/keys) 创建并分发，开发者无需自己注册。

1. 管理员登录管理后台 →「Key 管理」→「创建 Key」
2. 为该 Key 设置名称、备注、可选的消费限额
3. 将生成的 Key 复制交付给需要使用的开发者

## 发起第一个请求

将 `YOUR_API_KEY` 替换为管理员提供给你的 API Key：

{% tabs %}
{% tab title="使用 Anthropic 协议" %}

```
curl --request POST \
  --url https://api.neorouter.ai/v1/messages \
  --header 'content-type: application/json' \
  --header 'x-api-key: YOUR_API_KEY' \
  --data '{
    "model": "claude-opus-4-6",
    "max_tokens": 1024,
    "messages": [
      {
        "role": "user",
        "content": "你好！"
      }
    ]
  }'
```

{% endtab %}
{% tab title="使用 OpenAI 协议" %}

```
curl https://api.neorouter.ai/v1/responses \
  -H "Content-Type: application/json" \
  -H "Authorization: Bearer sk-YOUR_API_KEY" \
  -d '{
    "model": "gpt-5.3-codex",
    "input": "Hello!",
    "stream": false
  }'
```

{% endtab %}
{% endtabs %}

## 下一步

- 详细调用方式参见 [集成指南](/#/docs?key=integration)
- 完整接口定义参见 [API 参考](/#/docs?key=api-reference)
- 计费模式与对账方式参见 [定价与计费](/#/docs?key=pricing)
content_en:
<!-- docs-icon: 🚀 -->

# Quick Start

## Get an Enterprise Account

NeoRouter.AI uses an enterprise invitation system. Accounts are created and distributed by the platform sales team or administrators within your tenant.

1. If your organization has not yet set up a NeoRouter.AI account, please contact sales: <support@neorouter.ai>
2. Members of an existing tenant will receive an invitation email from the administrator. Click the link in the email to activate your account

## Get an API Key

API Keys are created and distributed by the tenant's Owner or Admin in the [Console](/#/console/keys). Developers do not need to register themselves.

1. Admin logs in to the Console → "Key Management" → "Create Key"
2. Set a name, description, and optional spending limit for the Key
3. Copy the generated Key and share it with the developers who need it

## Make Your First Request

Replace `YOUR_API_KEY` with the API Key provided by your administrator:

{% tabs %}
{% tab title="Using Anthropic Protocol" %}

```
curl --request POST \
  --url https://api.neorouter.ai/v1/messages \
  --header 'content-type: application/json' \
  --header 'x-api-key: YOUR_API_KEY' \
  --data '{
    "model": "claude-opus-4-6",
    "max_tokens": 1024,
    "messages": [
      {
        "role": "user",
        "content": "Hello!"
      }
    ]
  }'
```

{% endtab %}
{% tab title="Using OpenAI Protocol" %}

```
curl https://api.neorouter.ai/v1/responses \
  -H "Content-Type: application/json" \
  -H "Authorization: Bearer sk-YOUR_API_KEY" \
  -d '{
    "model": "gpt-5.3-codex",
    "input": "Hello!",
    "stream": false
  }'
```

{% endtab %}
{% endtabs %}

## Next Steps

- For detailed integration instructions, see the [Integration Guide](/#/docs?key=integration)
- For complete API specifications, see the [API Reference](/#/docs?key=api-reference)
- For billing model and reconciliation, see [Pricing & Billing](/#/docs?key=pricing)

title: 定价与计费
content_zh:
# 定价与计费 ## 合同定价 NeoRouter 对企业客户采用合同定价，由商务与您所在租户约定具体费率。合同费率覆盖所有已上架模型的输入、输出与缓存消耗。租户 Owner / Admin 可在 [管理后台 → 资金管理](/#/console/funds) 查看当前合同费率明细。 如需获取贵司专属报价，请联系商务：。 ## 计费模型 所有调用按实际 Token 消耗量计费，输入、输出、缓存消耗独立记账。 ### 单次调用扣费公式 ``` 单次费用 = 输入 Token × 输入单价 + 输出 Token × 输出单价 + 缓存写入 Token × 缓存写入单价 + 缓存读取 Token × 缓存读取单价 + 其他计费项（如 Web Search 按次计费） ``` Web Search：$10 / 1,000 次 单次扣费不足0.01的部分会累积到下次超过0.01的计费请求一并扣除。暂不支持 fast 模式。详细计费规则与实时扣款明细可在 [数据看板](/#/console/overview) 的调用日志中查看。 ### Anthropic (Claude) 价格示例 下表为 8 折价格示例（美元/百万 Token），实际以合同约定为准。
计费项claude-opus-4.6claude-sonnet-4.6claude-haiku-4.5
Input /M$4$2.40$0.80
Output /M$20$12$4
Cache Write (5min) /M$5$3$1
Cache Write (1h) /M$8$4.80$1.60
Cache Read /M$0.40$0.24$0.08
完整的模型价格请前往 [模型广场](/#/models) 查看。 ### OpenAI 价格示例 下表为 8 折价格示例（美元/百万 Token），实际以合同约定为准。
计费项gpt-5.3-codexgpt-5.5
Short context (< 272K)		gpt-5.5
Long context (≥ 272K)
Input /M$1.40$4$8
Output /M$11.20$24$36
Cache Read /M$0.14$0.40$0.80
完整的模型价格请前往 [模型广场](/#/models) 查看。 ## 结算方式 NeoRouter 支持两种结算方式，由商务与租户签约时约定。 ## 对账与发票 - **资金变动明细**：Owner / Admin 可在 [资金管理](/#/console/funds) 查看每一笔额度变动（平台充值、调用扣费等） - **调用明细**：[公司总览](/#/console/overview) 提供按 Key、按模型的调用日志，可导出用于内部对账 - **发票与账单**：合同客户的发票开具由商务统一处理，请联系
content_en:
# Pricing & Billing ## Contract Pricing NeoRouter offers contract pricing for enterprise customers, with specific rates negotiated between the sales team and your tenant. Contract rates cover input, output, and cache consumption for all available models. Tenant Owner / Admin can view current contract rate details in [Console → Fund Management](/#/console/funds). To obtain a custom quote for your organization, please contact sales: . ## Billing Model All calls are billed based on actual token consumption, with input, output, and cache usage tracked independently. ### Per-Call Billing Formula ``` Per-call cost = Input Tokens × Input unit price + Output Tokens × Output unit price + Cache Write Tokens × Cache Write unit price + Cache Read Tokens × Cache Read unit price + Other billable items (e.g., Web Search billed per call) ``` Web Search: $10 / 1,000 calls Charges below $0.01 per call are accumulated and deducted together with the next billable request exceeding $0.01. Fast mode is not currently supported. Detailed billing rules and real-time deduction records can be viewed in the call logs on the [Dashboard](/#/console/overview). ### Anthropic (Claude) Pricing Example The table below shows 20% discounted pricing examples (USD / million tokens). Actual prices are subject to your contract terms.
Billing Itemclaude-opus-4.6claude-sonnet-4.6claude-haiku-4.5
Input /M$4$2.40$0.80
Output /M$20$12$4
Cache Write (5min) /M$5$3$1
Cache Write (1h) /M$8$4.80$1.60
Cache Read /M$0.40$0.24$0.08
For complete model pricing, visit the [Model Gallery](/#/models). ### OpenAI Pricing Example The table below shows 20% discounted pricing examples (USD / million tokens). Actual prices are subject to your contract terms.
Billing Itemgpt-5.3-codexgpt-5.5
Short context (< 272K)		gpt-5.5
Long context (≥ 272K)
Input /M$1.40$4$8
Output /M$11.20$24$36
Cache Read /M$0.14$0.40$0.80
For complete model pricing, visit the [Model Gallery](/#/models). ## Settlement Methods NeoRouter supports two settlement methods, agreed upon between the sales team and the tenant at contract signing. ## Reconciliation & Invoicing - **Fund Activity Details**: Owner / Admin can view every balance change (platform top-ups, call deductions, etc.) in [Fund Management](/#/console/funds) - **Call Details**: [Company Overview](/#/console/overview) provides call logs by Key and by model, exportable for internal reconciliation - **Invoices & Billing**: Invoice issuance for contract customers is handled uniformly by the sales team. Please contact

title: 集成指南
content_zh:
# 集成指南

## 编程开发

在你的 AI 编程工具中接入更多优质模型

### Claude Code

{% hint style="warning" %}
Claude Code 暂不支持 GPT 模型
{% endhint %}

1. 请先安装 [Node.js](https://nodejs.org/) 18 或更新版本，如已安装可忽略本条
2. **准备安装**

- Linux/MacOS 系统不需额外操作，默认环境即可。
- Windows 系统需要参考 [Windows 系统安装 WSL](https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/windows/wsl/install) 安装 WSL 或参考 [Windows 系统安装 Git for Windows](https://git-scm.com/install/windows) 安装 Git for Windows，然后在 WSL 或 Git Bash 中执行下方命令。

3. **在终端中安装**：

```bash
npm install -g @anthropic-ai/claude-code

# 验证安装（如有版本号输出，则表示安装成功）：
claude --version
```

4. **创建/编辑** `settings.json`

{% hint style="info" %}
配置前，请确保已清除以下 Anthropic 官方相关环境变量，以免影响 API 正常使用：`ANTHROPIC_AUTH_TOKEN`、`ANTHROPIC_BASE_URL`
{% endhint %}

- macOS/Linux：`~/.claude/settings.json`
- Windows：`用户目录/.claude/settings.json`

> 如果 `.claude` 目录不存在，用户可自己创建。

5. **将** `YOUR_API_KEY` **换成你的 API Key**：

```json
{
  "env": {
    "ANTHROPIC_API_KEY": "YOUR_API_KEY",
    "ANTHROPIC_BASE_URL": "https://api.neorouter.ai",
    "CLAUDE_CODE_DISABLE_EXPERIMENTAL_BETAS": "1"
  }
}
```

6. **创建/编辑** `.claude.json`

- macOS/Linux：`~/.claude.json`
- Windows：`用户目录/.claude.json`

```json
{
  "hasCompletedOnboarding": true
}
```

7. **使配置生效启动**

配置完成后，重新打开终端窗口使配置生效。首次启动需完成以下操作：选择"信任此文件夹 (Trust This Folder)"，允许 Claude Code 访问项目文件。

```bash
claude
```

### Codex

{% hint style="warning" %}
Codex 暂不支持 Claude 模型
{% endhint %}

官方文档：[https://developers.openai.com/codex/quickstart](https://developers.openai.com/codex/quickstart)

1. **安装 Codex CLI**

macOS / Linux：

```bash
npm install -g @openai/codex
# 或使用 Homebrew（macOS）
brew install codex
```

Windows（PowerShell）：

```powershell
npm install -g @openai/codex
```

2. **创建/编辑 Codex 配置文件**

macOS / Linux 配置文件路径：

```text
~/.codex/config.toml
```

Windows 配置文件路径：

```text
%USERPROFILE%\.codex\config.toml
```

例如：`C:\Users\你的用户名\.codex\config.toml`

macOS / Linux 示例配置：

```toml
model          = "YOUR_MODEL_ID"
model_provider = "neorouter"

[model_providers.neorouter]
name     = "NeoRouter"
base_url = "https://api.neorouter.ai/v1"
wire_api = "responses"
requires_openai_auth = false
supports_websockets = false

[model_providers.neorouter.auth]
command = "printenv"
args = ["NEOROUTER_API_KEY"]
```

Windows 示例配置（PowerShell）：

```toml
model          = "YOUR_MODEL_ID"
model_provider = "neorouter"

[model_providers.neorouter]
name     = "Neorouter"
base_url = "https://api.neorouter.ai/v1"
wire_api = "responses"
requires_openai_auth = false
supports_websockets = false

[model_providers.neorouter.auth]
command = "powershell"
args = ["-NoProfile", "-Command", "$env:NEOROUTER_API_KEY"]
```

3. **配置 API Key 环境变量**

macOS / Linux（以 zsh 为例，在 `~/.zshrc` 中新增）：

```bash
export NEOROUTER_API_KEY="YOUR_API_KEY"
```

然后执行：

```bash
source ~/.zshrc
```

或重新打开终端窗口。

Windows（PowerShell）：

```powershell
[Environment]::SetEnvironmentVariable("NEOROUTER_API_KEY", "YOUR_API_KEY", "User")
```

执行后重新打开 PowerShell 或终端窗口，使环境变量生效。

4. **启动 Codex**

```bash
codex
```

## 代码集成

### Python

Anthropic 协议：

```bash
pip install anthropic
```

OpenAI 协议（Codex 系列）：

```bash
pip install openai
```

{% tabs %}
{% tab title="Anthropic SDK（Claude 系列）" %}

```python
import anthropic

client = anthropic.Anthropic(
    api_key="YOUR_API_KEY",
    base_url="https://api.neorouter.ai/v1",
)

message = client.messages.create(
    model="claude-opus-4-6",
    max_tokens=1024,
    messages=[{"role": "user", "content": "你好"}],
)
print(message.content[0].text)

# 流式输出
with client.messages.stream(
    model="claude-opus-4-6",
    max_tokens=1024,
    messages=[{"role": "user", "content": "写一篇关于 AI 的短文"}],
) as stream:
    for text in stream.text_stream:
        print(text, end="", flush=True)
```

{% endtab %}
{% tab title="OpenAI SDK（Codex 系列）" %}

```python
from openai import OpenAI

client = OpenAI(
    api_key="sk-YOUR_API_KEY",
    base_url="https://api.neorouter.ai/v1",
)

response = client.responses.create(
    model="gpt-5.3-codex",
    input="Hello!",
)

print(response.output_text)
```

{% endtab %}
{% endtabs %}

### Node.js

Anthropic 协议：

```bash
npm install @anthropic-ai/sdk
```

OpenAI 协议（Codex 系列）：

```bash
npm install openai
```

{% tabs %}
{% tab title="Anthropic SDK（Claude 系列）" %}

```typescript
import Anthropic from '@anthropic-ai/sdk'

const client = new Anthropic({
  apiKey: 'YOUR_API_KEY',
  baseURL: 'https://api.neorouter.ai/v1',
})

const message = await client.messages.create({
  model: 'claude-opus-4-6',
  max_tokens: 1024,
  messages: [{ role: 'user', content: '你好' }],
})
console.log(message.content[0].text)

// 流式输出
const stream = await client.messages.stream({
  model: 'claude-opus-4-6',
  max_tokens: 1024,
  messages: [{ role: 'user', content: '写一篇关于 AI 的短文' }],
})

for await (const chunk of stream) {
  if (chunk.type === 'content_block_delta' && chunk.delta.type === 'text_delta') {
    process.stdout.write(chunk.delta.text)
  }
}
```

{% endtab %}
{% tab title="OpenAI SDK（Codex 系列）" %}

```js
import OpenAI from 'openai'

const client = new OpenAI({
  apiKey: 'sk-YOUR_API_KEY',
  baseURL: 'https://api.neorouter.ai/v1',
})

const response = await client.responses.create({
  model: 'gpt-5.3-codex',
  input: 'Hello!',
})

console.log(response.output_text)
```

{% endtab %}
{% endtabs %}

### Java

{% tabs %}
{% tab title="Anthropic SDK（Claude 系列）" %}

```java
import okhttp3.*;
import org.json.*;

public class Test {
  public static void main(String[] args) throws Exception {
    OkHttpClient client = new OkHttpClient();

    String body = new JSONObject()
      .put("model", "claude-opus-4-6")
      .put("max_tokens", 1024)
      .put("messages", new JSONArray()
        .put(new JSONObject()
          .put("role", "user")
          .put("content", "你好")))
      .toString();

    Request request = new Request.Builder()
      .url("https://api.neorouter.ai/v1/messages")
      .post(RequestBody.create(body, MediaType.get("application/json")))
      .addHeader("x-api-key", "YOUR_API_KEY")
      .addHeader("anthropic-version", "2023-06-01")
      .addHeader("Content-Type", "application/json")
      .build();

    try (Response response = client.newCall(request).execute()) {
      JSONObject result = new JSONObject(response.body().string());
      System.out.println(
        result.getJSONArray("content")
          .getJSONObject(0)
          .getString("text")
      );
    }
  }
}
```

{% endtab %}
{% tab title="OpenAI SDK（Codex 系列）" %}

```java
import com.openai.client.OpenAIClient;
import com.openai.client.okhttp.OpenAIOkHttpClient;
import com.openai.models.responses.Response;
import com.openai.models.responses.ResponseCreateParams;

public class Main {
    public static void main(String[] args) {
        OpenAIClient client = OpenAIOkHttpClient.builder()
                .apiKey("sk-YOUR_API_KEY")
                .baseUrl("https://api.neorouter.ai/v1")
                .build();

        ResponseCreateParams params = ResponseCreateParams.builder()
                .model("gpt-5.3-codex")
                .input("Hello!")
                .build();

        Response response = client.responses().create(params);
        System.out.println(response.outputText());
    }
}
```

{% endtab %}
{% endtabs %}

### Go

{% tabs %}
{% tab title="Anthropic 协议（Claude 系列）" %}

```go
package main

import (
  "bytes"
  "encoding/json"
  "fmt"
  "io"
  "net/http"
)

func main() {
  payload := map[string]interface{}{
    "model":      "claude-opus-4-6",
    "max_tokens": 1024,
    "messages": []map[string]string{
      {"role": "user", "content": "你好"},
    },
  }

  body, _ := json.Marshal(payload)

  req, _ := http.NewRequest(
    "POST",
    "https://api.neorouter.ai/v1/messages",
    bytes.NewBuffer(body),
  )
  req.Header.Set("x-api-key", "YOUR_API_KEY")
  req.Header.Set("anthropic-version", "2023-06-01")
  req.Header.Set("Content-Type", "application/json")

  resp, _ := http.DefaultClient.Do(req)
  defer resp.Body.Close()

  result, _ := io.ReadAll(resp.Body)
  fmt.Println(string(result))
}
```

{% endtab %}
{% tab title="OpenAI 协议（Codex 系列）" %}

```go
package main

import (
  "bytes"
  "encoding/json"
  "fmt"
  "io"
  "net/http"
)

func main() {
  payload := map[string]interface{}{
    "model": "gpt-5.3-codex",
    "input": "Hello!",
  }

  body, _ := json.Marshal(payload)

  req, _ := http.NewRequest(
    "POST",
    "https://api.neorouter.ai/v1/responses",
    bytes.NewBuffer(body),
  )
  req.Header.Set("Authorization", "Bearer sk-YOUR_API_KEY")
  req.Header.Set("Content-Type", "application/json")

  resp, _ := http.DefaultClient.Do(req)
  defer resp.Body.Close()

  result, _ := io.ReadAll(resp.Body)
  fmt.Println(string(result))
}
```

{% endtab %}
{% endtabs %}

title: API参考
content_zh:
# API 参考 ## 限频说明 为保障所有用户的服务质量，API 对每个租户设有速率限制，详情请参照合同或咨询 。同一租户下的所有 Key 共享租户级限频。 **限流说明：** - 速率限制采用令牌桶算法，额度会持续恢复，支持短时突发请求 - RPM 和 TPM 按模型独立计算——即使 A 模型额度耗尽，仍可正常请求 B 模型 - RPD 为租户级全局额度，所有模型的请求共同消耗 - TPM 在请求发起时按预估 Token 数预扣额度，请求完成后按实际用量自动修正 **触发限流时：** - 返回 HTTP `429 Too Many Requests` - 响应头 `Retry-After` 提示建议的重试等待秒数 - 响应头 `X-RateLimit-Limit-Requests` / `X-RateLimit-Remaining-Requests` 反映当前 RPM 额度 - 响应头 `X-RateLimit-Limit-Tokens` / `X-RateLimit-Remaining-Tokens` 反映当前 TPM 额度 {% hint style="info" %} 如需提频，请联系 support@neorouter.ai {% endhint %} ## Anthropic 协议 `POST /v1/messages` 使用 Anthropic 原生格式调用 Claude 系列模型。请求头中需包含`x-api-key: YOUR_API_KEY` ### 请求体参数
参数类型说明必填
modelstring模型IDtrue
messagearray对话消息数组true
max_tokensinteger最大输出 token 数true
更多参数，详见Anthropic官方。 ### 示例请求 ``` curl --request POST \ --url https://api.neorouter.ai/v1/messages \ --header 'content-type: application/json' \ --header 'x-api-key: YOUR_API_KEY' \ --data '{ "model": "claude-sonnet-4-6", "max_tokens": 1024, "system": "你是一个专业的代码助手", "messages": [ { "role": "user", "content": "帮我用 Python 写一个快速排序" } ] }' ``` ### 响应示例 ``` { "content": [ { "type": "text", "text": "你好！很高兴见到你 😊 有什么我可以帮你的吗？" } ], "id": "msg_01PXFpjoBEXMn1yEGDdp8RrH", "model": "claude-opus-4-6", "role": "assistant", "stop_details": null, "stop_reason": "end_turn", "stop_sequence": null, "type": "message", "usage": { "input_tokens": 10, "cache_creation_input_tokens": 0, "cache_read_input_tokens": 0, "cache_creation": { "ephemeral_5m_input_tokens": 0, "ephemeral_1h_input_tokens": 0 }, "output_tokens": 31, "service_tier": "standard", "inference_geo": "not_available" } } ``` ### 流式输出 请求示例 ``` curl -N --request POST \ --url https://api.neorouter.ai/v1/messages \ --header 'content-type: application/json' \ --header 'x-api-key: YOUR_API_KEY' \ --header 'accept: text/event-stream' \ --data '{ "model": "claude-opus-4-6", "max_tokens": 1024, "messages": [ { "role": "user", "content": [ { "type": "text", "text": "你好" } ] } ], "stream": true }' ``` 响应以 SSE 格式逐块返回，示例： ``` event: message_start data: {"type":"message_start","message":{"id":"msg_01...","type":"message","role":"assistant","model":"claude-opus-4-6","stop_reason":null,"usage":{"input_tokens":10,"output_tokens":0}}} event: content_block_delta data: {"type":"content_block_delta","index":0,"delta":{"type":"text_delta","text":"你好"}} event: message_delta data: {"type":"message_delta","delta":{"stop_reason":"end_turn"},"usage":{"output_tokens":5}} event: message_stop data: {"type":"message_stop"} ``` ## OpenAI 协议（Responses API） `POST /v1/responses` 使用 OpenAI Responses API 格式调用 Codex 系列模型。请求头中需包含 `Authorization: Bearer YOUR_API_KEY`。 ### 请求体参数
参数类型说明必填
modelstring模型IDtrue
inputstring用户输入内容true
streamboolean是否开启流式输出，默认 falsefalse
更多参数，详见 OpenAI 官方文档。 ### 示例请求 ``` curl --request POST \ --url https://api.neorouter.ai/v1/responses \ --header 'Content-Type: application/json' \ --header 'Authorization: Bearer YOUR_API_KEY' \ --data '{ "model": "YOUR_MODEL_ID", "input": "帮我用 Python 写一个快速排序", "stream": false }' ``` ### 响应示例 ```json { "id": "resp_xxxxx", "object": "response", "model": "YOUR_MODEL_ID", "output_text": "def quicksort(arr):\n if len(arr) <= 1:\n return arr\n ...", "usage": { "input_tokens": 12, "output_tokens": 86, "total_tokens": 98 } } ``` ### 流式输出 ``` curl -N --request POST \ --url https://api.neorouter.ai/v1/responses \ --header 'Content-Type: application/json' \ --header 'Authorization: Bearer YOUR_API_KEY' \ --data '{ "model": "YOUR_MODEL_ID", "input": "你好", "stream": true }' ``` 响应以 SSE 格式逐块返回，示例： ``` event: response.output_text.delta data: {"type":"response.output_text.delta","delta":"你好"} event: response.output_text.done data: {"type":"response.output_text.done","text":"你好！有什么我可以帮你的吗？"} event: response.completed data: {"type":"response.completed","response":{"id":"resp_xxxxx","status":"completed","output_text":"你好！有什么我可以帮你的吗？","usage":{"input_tokens":5,"output_tokens":12,"total_tokens":17}}} ``` ## 错误码
HTTP状态码语义示例错误信息
400请求体无法读取或解析失败。请求体解析失败: unexpected end of JSON input
400请求的模型不存在或当前不可用。The model 'xxx' does not exist
400上游供应商返回 400，请求参数被上游拒绝，原始响应透传。(透传上游原始响应体)
401请求未携带 API Key（需通过 x-api-key 或 Authorization: Bearer 传递）。Missing API Key
401API Key 不存在、格式错误或未注册。Invalid API Key
402（预付费）租户余额不足以承担本次请求的预估费用。insufficient_balance: balance not enough
402（月结）租户欠费已超出授信额度。credit_limit_exceeded: tenant credit exceeded
403API Key 已被禁用。Key disabled
403租户已被平台冻结，所有 Key 暂停服务。account suspended: frozen
403所请求的模型未对该租户启用。model_not_enabled: this model is not enabled for the tenant
413请求体超过允许的最大大小。请求体过大
429请求频次超过租户级限频额度。rate limit exceeded
### 补充说明 #### 429 响应头 当触发限频（429）时，响应会包含以下辅助头信息： | 响应头 | 说明 | | -------------------------------- | ------------------ | | `Retry-After` | 建议的重试等待秒数 | | `X-RateLimit-Limit-Requests` | RPM 上限 | | `X-RateLimit-Remaining-Requests` | RPM 剩余次数 | | `X-RateLimit-Limit-Tokens` | TPM 上限 | | `X-RateLimit-Remaining-Tokens` | TPM 剩余额度 | ## 查询可用模型 `GET /v1/models` ### 示例请求 {% tabs %} {% tab title="Anthropic 协议" %} ``` curl --request GET \ --url https://api.neorouter.ai/v1/models \ --header 'Content-Type: application/json' \ --header 'x-api-key: YOUR_API_KEY' ``` {% endtab %} {% tab title="OpenAI 协议" %} ``` curl --request GET \ --url https://api.neorouter.ai/v1/models \ --header 'Content-Type: application/json' \ --header 'Authorization: Bearer YOUR_API_KEY' ``` {% endtab %} {% endtabs %} ### 响应示例 {% tabs %} {% tab title="Anthropic 协议" %} ``` { "data": [ { "id": "claude-haiku-4-5-20251001", "type": "model", "display_name": "Claude Haiku 4.5" }, { "id": "claude-opus-4-6", "type": "model", "display_name": "Claude Opus 4.6" }, { "id": "claude-sonnet-4-6", "type": "model", "display_name": "Claude Sonnet 4.6" } ], "has_more": false, "first_id": "claude-haiku-4-5-20251001", "last_id": "claude-sonnet-4-6" } ``` {% endtab %} {% tab title="OpenAI 协议" %} ``` { "data": [ { "id": "gpt-5.3-codex", "type": "model", "display_name": "GPT-5.3 Codex" }, { "id": "gpt-5.5", "type": "model", "display_name": "GPT-5.5" } ], "has_more": false, "first_id": "gpt-5.3-codex", "last_id": "gpt-5.5" } ``` {% endtab %} {% endtabs %} {% hint style="info" %} 建议以此接口返回结果为准，获取最新可用模型名称。 {% endhint %}
content_en:
# API Reference ## Rate Limiting To ensure quality of service for all users, the API enforces rate limits per tenant. For details, please refer to your contract or contact . All Keys under the same tenant share the tenant-level rate limit. **Rate Limit Details:** - Rate limiting uses the token bucket algorithm — quota continuously replenishes and supports short bursts - RPM and TPM are calculated independently per model — even if Model A's quota is exhausted, Model B can still be called normally - RPD is a tenant-level global quota shared across all model requests - TPM pre-deducts quota based on estimated token count when a request is initiated, and automatically adjusts to actual usage upon completion **When rate limited:** - Returns HTTP `429 Too Many Requests` - Response header `Retry-After` indicates the recommended wait time in seconds before retrying - Response headers `X-RateLimit-Limit-Requests` / `X-RateLimit-Remaining-Requests` reflect the current RPM quota - Response headers `X-RateLimit-Limit-Tokens` / `X-RateLimit-Remaining-Tokens` reflect the current TPM quota {% hint style="info" %} To request a rate limit increase, please contact support@neorouter.ai {% endhint %} ## Anthropic Protocol `POST /v1/messages` Call Claude series models using the Anthropic native format. The request header must include `x-api-key: YOUR_API_KEY` ### Request Body Parameters
ParameterTypeDescriptionRequired
modelstringModel IDtrue
messagearrayConversation message arraytrue
max_tokensintegerMaximum output token counttrue
For more parameters, refer to the official Anthropic documentation. ### Example Request ``` curl --request POST \ --url https://api.neorouter.ai/v1/messages \ --header 'content-type: application/json' \ --header 'x-api-key: YOUR_API_KEY' \ --data '{ "model": "claude-sonnet-4-6", "max_tokens": 1024, "system": "You are a professional coding assistant", "messages": [ { "role": "user", "content": "Write a quicksort in Python" } ] }' ``` ### Response Example ``` { "content": [ { "type": "text", "text": "Hello! Nice to meet you 😊 How can I help you?" } ], "id": "msg_01PXFpjoBEXMn1yEGDdp8RrH", "model": "claude-opus-4-6", "role": "assistant", "stop_details": null, "stop_reason": "end_turn", "stop_sequence": null, "type": "message", "usage": { "input_tokens": 10, "cache_creation_input_tokens": 0, "cache_read_input_tokens": 0, "cache_creation": { "ephemeral_5m_input_tokens": 0, "ephemeral_1h_input_tokens": 0 }, "output_tokens": 31, "service_tier": "standard", "inference_geo": "not_available" } } ``` ### Streaming Output Request Example ``` curl -N --request POST \ --url https://api.neorouter.ai/v1/messages \ --header 'content-type: application/json' \ --header 'x-api-key: YOUR_API_KEY' \ --header 'accept: text/event-stream' \ --data '{ "model": "claude-opus-4-6", "max_tokens": 1024, "messages": [ { "role": "user", "content": [ { "type": "text", "text": "Hello" } ] } ], "stream": true }' ``` Response is returned in SSE format chunk by chunk, example: ``` event: message_start data: {"type":"message_start","message":{"id":"msg_01...","type":"message","role":"assistant","model":"claude-opus-4-6","stop_reason":null,"usage":{"input_tokens":10,"output_tokens":0}}} event: content_block_delta data: {"type":"content_block_delta","index":0,"delta":{"type":"text_delta","text":"Hello"}} event: message_delta data: {"type":"message_delta","delta":{"stop_reason":"end_turn"},"usage":{"output_tokens":5}} event: message_stop data: {"type":"message_stop"} ``` ## OpenAI Protocol (Responses API) `POST /v1/responses` Call Codex series models using the OpenAI Responses API format. The request header must include `Authorization: Bearer YOUR_API_KEY`. ### Request Body Parameters
ParameterTypeDescriptionRequired
modelstringModel IDtrue
inputstringUser input contenttrue
streambooleanEnable streaming output, defaults to falsefalse
For more parameters, refer to the official OpenAI documentation. ### Example Request ``` curl --request POST \ --url https://api.neorouter.ai/v1/responses \ --header 'Content-Type: application/json' \ --header 'Authorization: Bearer YOUR_API_KEY' \ --data '{ "model": "YOUR_MODEL_ID", "input": "Write a quicksort in Python", "stream": false }' ``` ### Response Example ```json { "id": "resp_xxxxx", "object": "response", "model": "YOUR_MODEL_ID", "output_text": "def quicksort(arr):\n if len(arr) <= 1:\n return arr\n ...", "usage": { "input_tokens": 12, "output_tokens": 86, "total_tokens": 98 } } ``` ### Streaming Output ``` curl -N --request POST \ --url https://api.neorouter.ai/v1/responses \ --header 'Content-Type: application/json' \ --header 'Authorization: Bearer YOUR_API_KEY' \ --data '{ "model": "YOUR_MODEL_ID", "input": "Hello", "stream": true }' ``` Response is returned in SSE format chunk by chunk, example: ``` event: response.output_text.delta data: {"type":"response.output_text.delta","delta":"Hello"} event: response.output_text.done data: {"type":"response.output_text.done","text":"Hello! How can I help you?"} event: response.completed data: {"type":"response.completed","response":{"id":"resp_xxxxx","status":"completed","output_text":"Hello! How can I help you?","usage":{"input_tokens":5,"output_tokens":12,"total_tokens":17}}} ``` ## Error Codes
HTTP Status CodeDescriptionExample Error Message
400Request body cannot be read or failed to parse.Failed to parse request body: unexpected end of JSON input
400The requested model does not exist or is currently unavailable.The model 'xxx' does not exist
400Upstream provider returned 400; request parameters were rejected by the upstream. Original response is passed through.(Upstream original response body passed through)
401Request did not include an API Key (must be passed via x-api-key or Authorization: Bearer).Missing API Key
401API Key does not exist, has an invalid format, or is not registered.Invalid API Key
402(Prepaid) Tenant balance is insufficient to cover the estimated cost of this request.insufficient_balance: balance not enough
402(Monthly billing) Tenant's outstanding balance has exceeded the credit limit.credit_limit_exceeded: tenant credit exceeded
403API Key has been disabled.Key disabled
403Tenant has been frozen by the platform; all Keys are suspended.account suspended: frozen
403The requested model is not enabled for this tenant.model_not_enabled: this model is not enabled for the tenant
413Request body exceeds the maximum allowed size.Request body too large
429Request frequency has exceeded the tenant-level rate limit.rate limit exceeded
### Additional Notes #### 429 Response Headers When rate limiting is triggered (429), the response includes the following informational headers: | Response Header | Description | | -------------------------------- | ------------------------------------ | | `Retry-After` | Recommended wait time before retry (seconds) | | `X-RateLimit-Limit-Requests` | RPM upper limit | | `X-RateLimit-Remaining-Requests` | RPM remaining count | | `X-RateLimit-Limit-Tokens` | TPM upper limit | | `X-RateLimit-Remaining-Tokens` | TPM remaining quota | ## Query Available Models `GET /v1/models` ### Example Request {% tabs %} {% tab title="Anthropic Protocol" %} ``` curl --request GET \ --url https://api.neorouter.ai/v1/models \ --header 'Content-Type: application/json' \ --header 'x-api-key: YOUR_API_KEY' ``` {% endtab %} {% tab title="OpenAI Protocol" %} ``` curl --request GET \ --url https://api.neorouter.ai/v1/models \ --header 'Content-Type: application/json' \ --header 'Authorization: Bearer YOUR_API_KEY' ``` {% endtab %} {% endtabs %} ### Response Example {% tabs %} {% tab title="Anthropic Protocol" %} ``` { "data": [ { "id": "claude-haiku-4-5-20251001", "type": "model", "display_name": "Claude Haiku 4.5" }, { "id": "claude-opus-4-6", "type": "model", "display_name": "Claude Opus 4.6" }, { "id": "claude-sonnet-4-6", "type": "model", "display_name": "Claude Sonnet 4.6" } ], "has_more": false, "first_id": "claude-haiku-4-5-20251001", "last_id": "claude-sonnet-4-6" } ``` {% endtab %} {% tab title="OpenAI Protocol" %} ``` { "data": [ { "id": "gpt-5.3-codex", "type": "model", "display_name": "GPT-5.3 Codex" }, { "id": "gpt-5.5", "type": "model", "display_name": "GPT-5.5" } ], "has_more": false, "first_id": "gpt-5.3-codex", "last_id": "gpt-5.5" } ``` {% endtab %} {% endtabs %} {% hint style="info" %} It is recommended to use this endpoint to retrieve the latest available model names. {% endhint %}

title: FAQ
content_zh:
# FAQ

Q：NeoRouter 和直接调用官方 API 有什么区别？

A：NeoRouter 是面向企业的 AI 网关平台，严选顶尖模型原生接入，为企业团队提供统一入口与治理能力。相比直接对接各家官方 API：

- 一个 Key、一个 Base URL，即可调用全部上架模型，无需对接与维护多家 API
- 按团队、按 Key 细粒度分配额度与权限，团队调用行为实时可观测
- 支持合同定价、月结授信、统一开票，满足企业采购与财务合规
- 平台代维护供应商稳定性，自动故障转移，免去企业侧的运维投入

---

Q：平台支持哪些模型和协议？

A：平台支持 **Claude 系列**（Anthropic Messages API 格式）和 **Codex 系列**（OpenAI Responses API 格式），完整模型列表见[模型广场](/#/models)。

---

Q：使用价格是怎样的？

A：NeoRouter 对企业客户采用合同定价，由商务与您所在租户约定。每家租户可在 [管理后台 → 资金管理](/#/console/funds) 查看当前合同费率、实时余额与消费明细。模型当前公示价格可在 [模型广场](/#/models) 查看。如需更详细的报价，请联系商务：<support@neorouter.ai>。

---

Q：怎么计费的？

A：按实际 Token 消耗量计费，输入、输出、缓存消耗独立记账。每次调用的 Token 数与费用均实时记录在 [管理后台 → 数据看板](/#/console/overview) 的调用详情中，支持按 Key、按模型多维分析，账单透明可控。

---

Q：使用服务过程中安全吗？

A：我们高度重视企业客户的数据安全：

1. 全链路加密：所有数据传输通过 HTTPS 加密通道，防止中间人攻击
2. 隐私保护：严格遵守相关隐私法规，具体细节以 [隐私政策](/#/privacy) 为准
3. 角色与 Key 双重隔离：Owner / Admin 分权管理，Key 支持独立消费限额与按需撤销

---

Q：API Key 泄露了怎么办？

A：立即让 Owner 或 Admin 登录 [管理后台 → Key 管理](/#/console/keys)，禁用或删除泄露的 Key 并重新创建。如发现租户账户存在异常消耗，请同步联系 <support@neorouter.ai>，我们将协助核查与处理。

---

Q：租户账户被冻结了怎么办？

A：租户被平台冻结时（通常因为欠费或合规原因），已发放的 Key 将暂停服务，管理后台也会提示冻结原因。请联系商务 <support@neorouter.ai> 确认解冻条件，完成后账户将自动恢复。

---

Q：支持开具发票吗？

A：支持。合同客户的发票开具与账单周期由商务对接确认，请联系 <support@neorouter.ai> 获取发票或账单。
content_en:
# FAQ

Q: What's the difference between NeoRouter and calling official APIs directly?

A: NeoRouter is an enterprise AI gateway platform that provides native access to top-tier models, offering unified entry and governance capabilities for enterprise teams. Compared to integrating with each provider's official API directly:

- One Key, one Base URL — access all available models without integrating and maintaining multiple APIs
- Fine-grained quota and permission allocation by team and by Key, with real-time observability of team usage
- Contract pricing, monthly billing with credit lines, and unified invoicing to meet enterprise procurement and financial compliance
- Platform-managed provider stability with automatic failover, eliminating operational overhead on the enterprise side

---

Q: What models and protocols does the platform support?

A: The platform supports **Claude series** (Anthropic Messages API format) and **Codex series** (OpenAI Responses API format). See the full model list at [Model Gallery](/#/models).

---

Q: How is pricing structured?

A: NeoRouter offers contract pricing for enterprise customers, negotiated between the sales team and your tenant. Each tenant's Owner / Admin can view the current contract rates, real-time balance, and consumption details in [Console → Fund Management](/#/console/funds). Current published model prices are available at [Model Gallery](/#/models). For a detailed quote, please contact sales: <support@neorouter.ai>.

---

Q: How does billing work?

A: Billing is based on actual token consumption, with input, output, and cache usage tracked independently. The token count and cost for each call are recorded in real-time in the [Console → Dashboard](/#/console/overview) call details, supporting multi-dimensional analysis by Key and by model, ensuring transparent and controllable billing.

---

Q: Is the service secure?

A: We take enterprise data security very seriously:

1. Full transport: All data transmission is via HTTPS encrypted channels to prevent man-in-the-middle attacks
2. Privacy protection: Strict compliance with relevant privacy regulations; see [Privacy Policy](/#/privacy) for details
3. Role and Key dual isolation: Owner / Admin role-based access control, with Keys supporting independent spending limits and on-demand revocation

---

Q: What should I do if my API Key is leaked?

A: Have the Owner or Admin immediately log in to [Console → Key Management](/#/console/keys), disable or delete the compromised Key, and create a new one. If you detect abnormal consumption on the tenant account, please also contact <support@neorouter.ai> and we will assist with investigation and resolution.

---

Q: What should I do if the tenant account is frozen?

A: When a tenant is frozen by the platform (usually due to overdue payment or compliance reasons), all issued Keys will be suspended and the console will display the reason for freezing. Please contact sales at <support@neorouter.ai> to confirm the conditions for unfreezing; once resolved, the account will be automatically restored.

---

Q: Do you issue invoices?

A: Yes. Invoice issuance and billing cycles for contract customers are coordinated by the sales team. Please contact <support@neorouter.ai> for invoices or billing statements.
